liturgical_note: Liturgical title; compound of θεός + τόκος (birth). Not in classical LSJ.
Used as the proper name of the God of Israel in LXX and NT.
Vocative Κύριε — the standard liturgical address 'O Lord'.
LSJ primary: αἷμα = blood. Liturgical context: guilt of bloodshed.
Genitive σου; appears as 'your' in liturgical translation.

gloss: fill with grace, bestow grace upon
liturgical_note: Perfect passive participle κεχαριτωμένη = "full of grace" (O Full of Grace) — the Annunciation greeting to the Theotokos (Luke 1:28).
Accusative με; appears as 'me' in liturgical translation.
